Phoenix Fire Department and Regional Dispatch
Phoenix Fire Department (Phoenix Regional Fire Dispatch) dispatches many suburban agencies as well as PFD.
Phoenix FD itself uses the RWC system only for non-hazard incidents. Hazard incidentsÑare onÑthe Phoenix FD VHF frequencies.
